name: aha
description: Connect to Aha! to sync features, releases, ideas, and goals from your product roadmaps.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Your Aha! API key from Settings → Security → API Key.

install_fields.label: Aha! Subdomain (e.g. mycompany)
install_fields.description: The subdomain of your Aha! account (e.g. 'mycompany' for mycompany.aha.io).
